mapper.select: select * from community_reservation where user_id like concat('%',#{userId},'%') and user_name like concat('%',#{userName},'%') and user_phone like concat('%',#{userPhone},'%') and reservation_type like concat('%',#{reservationType},'%') and reservation_status like concat('%',#{reservationStatus},'%') order by create_time desc
mapper.update: update community_reservation set user_id = #{userId}, user_name = #{userName}, user_phone = #{userPhone}, reservation_type = #{reservationType}, reservation_time = #{reservationTime}, reservation_status = #{reservationStatus}, service_address = #{serviceAddress}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
